decisions.rationale: JOURNAL-04 anchors entry-detail-popup and ACs cite delete-confirm (ai_RNbBHXla), reflection btn/text (ai_RNbBHXlL/ai_RNbBHXlP), and delete subtree (ai_RNbBHXlX/ai_RNbBHXle); layout_notes cite ~55-entity subtree. Expand ui_refs for badge group ai_RNbBHXkl, disclaimer ai_RNbBHXlQ, and header row ai_RNbBHXlF from ir/slices/bTHDb____root.json at implement — not a decompose under-split.

JOURNAL-02/05 anchor RepeatingGroup roots and card templates with data-bubble-id ACs; layout_notes name badge/meta/divider groups (ai_RNbBHXix, ai_RNbBHXjc–jk, ai_RNbBHXjr, ai_RNbBHXjs, ai_RNbBHXiq). Pull full RG cell template paths from inventory at implement per ui-fidelity rubric without rewriting item boundaries.

AC-quality gap only: JOURNAL-03 AC-3 covers dismiss-without-persist; layout_notes already cite PopupClosed ResetGroup workflows (bTIYE/bTIYM). Add form-reset-on-close AC or document Vue v-model reset equivalence during JOURNAL-03/JOURNAL-04 implement — not decompose-blocking per ac-quality rules.

ENUM-03 on JOURNAL-04 is speculative: scope and ACs bind mood_tag_text badges and AI reflection, not path_enrollment_status or state_* enums. Trim depends_on during implement prep unless mood labels require ENUM-03 maps — same pattern as SHELL-08/10 ENUM-03 deferral.

Missing explicit project/ and adapter out-of-scope lines is documentation polish; all seven items are frontend-only with JOURNAL-02 AC-2 stating no project/ schema edits and journal CRUD via Supabase client. Append one-liners at implement kickoff per implementation-constraints — not a decompose rewrite.

summary: Review ok (88% readiness); 0 fix_now, 5 defer, 0 accept. Advance decompose: expand JOURNAL-02/04/05 ui_refs at implement, add popup form-reset AC on JOURNAL-03/04, trim speculative ENUM-03 from JOURNAL-04 depends_on, add out-of-scope clauses at implement kickoff.
